raw_consumer_statement:
My credit card was fraudulently used in XXXX in XX/XX/year> especially big charges at the XXXX XXXX, which the reservation was shown to have a different name on it. Amex has refused to deal with this after emailing and calling them hundreds of times over the pasXXXX XXXX  years and I am considering legal action as they pursue this bill. Amex is in violation of XXXX laws : Truth in Lending Act / Fair Credit Billing Act ( Reg Z ). I get billing error rights : AmEx must acknowledge my dispute within XXXX days and resolve within two billing cycles ( 90 days ) ; while its pending they cant try to collect the disputed amount, add related finance/late charges to it, or report it as delinquentand they cant demand a police report or sworn affidavit just to consider it. 

Unauthorized-use cap. By law my liability for an unauthorized credit-card charge is at most {$50.00} ( many issuers make it {$0.00} ). Theyre trying to stick me with a fraud charge, TILA 1643/ Reg Z 1026.12 ( b ). 

FCRA ( credit reporting ). Once I disputed through a credit bureau, AmEx ( as a furnisher ) must conduct a reasonable investigation, correct/update what they report, and note the account as disputed. Refusing to investigate after a bureau notifies them violates FCRA 1681s-2 ; CFPB has warned furnishers on this. 

FDCPA / Regulation F ( if a third-party collector is chasing it ). The collector has to send a validation notice, and if I dispute in writing within XXXX days they must cease collection until they mail verification. 

XXXX ( XXXX ). Misrepresenting my rights or unfairly continuing fees/collections despite a proper dispute can be an unfair or deceptive act or practice.
